snapshot.method_summary: Stage 1 estimate. Per-constituency 2021 Holyrood result + Scotland-wide April 2026 polling swing → FPTP winner prediction. Per-region list: 2021 regional-list shares + Scotland-wide polling swing + d'Hondt over 7 list seats with priorSeats apportioned as Scotland-wide constituency wins / 8 regions. Constituency-region mapping reflects 2026 boundary changes — region-specific baselines deferred to Stage 1.5.

input_polling_meta.label: Scottish vote intention — April 2026 placeholder (refresh required)
input_polling_meta.source: PLACEHOLDER — refresh from Survation / Ipsos / YouGov Scotland poll before launch
